parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "model": "google/gemma-3-4b-it", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "You are a Campaign Strategy Agent. Build a complete actionable campaign brief. Return ONLY a valid JSON object with these exact fields: campaign_name (string), launch_timeline (object with phase1, phase2, phase3 each having duration and focus), channel_strategy (object with channels as keys each having budget_percentage, tactic, expected_roas), budget_allocation (object with total_budget_recommendation and breakdown), kpis (array of objects with metric and target), launch_checklist (array of strings), executive_summary (string max 3 sentences), confidence_score (number 1-10). No markdown, no explanation, ONLY the JSON object.

Product: " + $json.product_name + "
Audience: " + $json.target_audience + "
Research: " + $json.research_data + "
Approved Content: " + $json.content_data + "
Content Review Score: " + $json.overall_score + "/10" } ], "temperature": 0.5, "max_tokens": 1500 } }}
